title: PGIMER BSc Nursing Important Dates 2026

detail.title: PGIMER BSc Nursing Important Dates 2026
detail.short_info: PGIMER BSc Nursing Application Form 2026 registration will start in June 2026 (Tentative). Check eligibility, application fee, important dates, exam pattern and how to apply for PGIMER Chandigarh B.Sc Nursing admission.

content.text: PGIMER BSc Nursing Application Form 2026 will be released soon by the Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER), Chandigarh. Interested female candidates can apply online for the 4-year B.Sc. Nursing programme. Registration is expected to begin in June 2026 (Tentative). This article provides complete details on eligibility criteria, application fee, important dates, exam pattern, and step-by-step application process to help aspirants prepare for PGIMER Chandigarh B.Sc Nursing admission 2026.

rows: Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education and Research (PGIMER), Chandigarh

items: Educational Qualification: Candidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, Biology and English.
Minimum Marks: Minimum 50% aggregate marks (45% for SC/ST candidates).
Age Limit: As per PGIMER guidelines (check official prospectus).
Other: Only female candidates are eligible for B.Sc. Nursing (4 years) course.

sections.heading: How to Apply for PGIMER BSc Nursing 2026

items: Visit the official website pgimer.edu.in.
Click on the link for B.Sc. Nursing Application Form 2026.
Register by providing basic details such as email ID and mobile number.
Fill the online application form with personal, academic and contact details.
Upload scanned documents, photograph and signature.
Pay the application fee online.
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

content.text: Apply Online Link: Will be available on the official PGIMER website (pgimer.edu.in) once released.

sections.heading: Documents Required for PGIMER Nursing Registration 2026

items: Passport-size recent scanned photograph
Scanned signature of the candidate
Candidate’s category certificate (if applicable)
Mark sheet and certificate of Class 10 and 12
Any other document as mentioned in the prospectus

rows: Physics, Chemistry, Biology, English & General Knowledge
+1 for correct answer, negative marking for wrong answers

content.text: Selection will be based on performance in the PGIMER BSc Nursing Entrance Exam followed by counselling and document verification
